question.string: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?
Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?animal WHERE {
  ?operation wdt:P31 wd:Q645883 .
  ?operation wdt:P1963 wd:Q625657 .
  ?animal wdt:P1343 ?operation .
}

How many General Secretaries of the CPSU were there before Leonid Brezhnev?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT (COUNT(?secretary) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?secretary wdt:P39 wd:Q87004793 .
  ?secretary wdt:P1344 ?position .
  ?position wdt:P580 ?startDate .
  FILTER(?startDate < "1964-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}

question.string: Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.
From which country are the beagles originally from?
From which country came the 2nd most winners of the Emmy Award ?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?country (COUNT(?winner) AS ?winnerCount) WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q66716595.
  ?winner wdt:P27 ?country.
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?winnerCount)
LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1.

question.string: has life expectancy in iran grown in any year after 1999?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?year ?lifeExpectancy WHERE {
  ?year wdt:P585 ?date .
  ?year wdt:P691 wd:Q293 .
  ?year wdt:P527 wd:Q293 .
  FILTER(?date > "1999-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}

question.string: has population of Isfahan increased at any point after 2006?

SELECT ?population ?time WHERE {
  wd:Q2021 wdt:P1082 ?population .
  ?time wdt:P580 ?date .
  FILTER(?date > "2006-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?mayor) AS ?female_mayors_count) WHERE {
  ?mayor wdt:P31 wd:Q747279 .
  ?mayor wdt:P206 wd:Q1055 .
  ?mayor wdt:P1539 ?female_population .
  FILTER(?female_population > 0)
}

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT (SUM(?awards) AS ?totalAwards) WHERE {
  ?film wdt:P57 wd:Q55400.
  ?film wdt:P166 ?award.
  ?award wdt:P31 wd:Q19020.
  BIND(COUNT(?award) AS ?awards)
}
